hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/(backend/app/.+\.py|backend/main\.py)$' && { rel="${f##*/backend/}"; (cd backend && uv run ruff format "$rel"); }; } 2>&1 || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/(backend/app/.+\.py|backend/main\.py)$' && (cd backend && uv run ty check app/ main.py); } 2>&1 || true
